title: vault: network errors mapped to Backend not Unavailable
description: Both get() and put() call reqwest .send().map_err(|e| SecretError::Backend). Network-level failures (DNS, connection refused, timeout) are transient — a retry after the network recovers may succeed. SecretError::Backend wrongly signals 'permanent failure, do not retry'. Fix: map reqwest::Error from .send() to SecretError::Unavailable in both get() and put(). Compare with doppler backend which correctly uses Unavailable for network errors.
